content: InTheWake CI 'Validate HTML' job checks ai-summary meta presence but does NOT run the validator's ai_summary_boilerplate rule fleet-wide. Phase 3.2b validator tightening surfaced 26 additional boilerplate ships that were not CI blockers — fixed in stacked PR #1480 atop #1477. Stacked PRs can pass CI while validator-only rules remain red until a follow-up lands.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
